nasb.text: “When your son asks you in time to come, saying, ‘What do the testimonies and the statutes and the judgments mean which the Lord our God commanded you?’

esv.text: “When your son asks you in time to come, ‘What is the meaning of the testimonies and the statutes and the rules that the Lord our God has commanded you?’

cnv.text: “日後，如果你的兒子問你：‘耶和華我們的　神吩咐的這法度、律例和典章，有甚麼意思呢？’

ccb.text: “将来你们的子孙会问，‘我们的上帝耶和华给你们颁布这些法度、律例和典章是什么意思？’
